commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a diagnostic activity cleanup primitive, wires retired-session cleanup into session reset/rollover and stuck-session recovery paths, and adds regression coverage for stale tool/model/embedded activity.

PR surface: Source +174, Tests +353. Total +527 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main lacks a diagnostic activity eviction primitive and reset/recovery hooks, while the linked report shows stale blocked_tool_call state surviving reset/recovery. I did not run a live gateway repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - Automerge should wait for the failing exact-head runtime check to be inspected, repaired, or rerun; the remaining blocker is validation, not a confirmed line-level code defect from this review.
